editor_api_500_root_cause: V1C unconditionally queried the optional presence_media_asset table during owner editor reads and draft serialization; hosted deployment can fail when the additive migration has not been applied.
roomkey_404_root_cause: The frontend shipped /r/[token] but did not include a /room/[id]/key published direct-entry route.

v1c_private_mode_active.activation_rule: media migration present plus protected storage configured plus deployment verification flag plus per-upload privacy verification

draft_bucket_private_verified: not proven on hosted in this pass

auth_signout_green.hosted: previous baseline passed; reconfirm after deployment

private_media_status: Capability-gated; not claimed for hosted until deployment readiness and smoke are complete.
final_recommendation: GO for operator-led pilots with non-sensitive uploads after hosted smoke.
